privileged_info_summary: The task involves posting an insurance payment of $180.00 (check/reference number 556677 from payer Star City Health) for patient Oliver Queen (DOB: 1985-05-15) in NOSH ChartingSystem for a service date of 2025-03-01. The patient has an outstanding charge amount of $250.00 from a CPT code 99214 (established patient office visit) encounter. All metadata values are confirmed to match the test data initialized by setup_task.sh, which creates the patient record and billing charge in the NOSH database using standard medical coding (CPT 99214 is a real established patient office visit code, ICD code R51.9 is a real diagnosis code for headache unspecified).
